query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A row of thin vertical light elements near the lower center of the frame, with a single small point of light above them, set against a black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A photograph exhibiting extreme underexposure, where a row of thin vertical light elements near the lower center and a single small point of light above them are the only visible features, while the rest of the scene is consumed by crushed shadows and near-total blackness, leaving all surrounding detail and context obscured.
